news.t: ADL and JLens Ring NYSE Bell to Celebrate TOV, the First Jewish Advocacy ETF, on Fourth Night of Hannukah
JLens Announces New Board Members, Including Former Financial Industry Executives
JLens and ADL Condemn UN Report Targeting Companies for Israel Ties
TOV, the First-Ever Jewish Advocacy ETF, Tops $100 Million in Assets Days After Launch
JLens Launches First-Ever Jewish Advocacy ETF (TOV) on NYSE, Backed by ADL Foundation and Jewish Organizations

holdings.infoBox: TOV is an equity ETF with a total of 499 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.63%, Apple at 6.70%, Alphabet at 5.64%, Microsoft at 4.56%, and Amazon.com at 3.66%.

overview.description: The JLens 500 Jewish Advocacy U.S. ETF (TOV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the JLens 500 Jewish Advocacy U.S. index. The fund tracks an index of large-cap US stocks while employing a methodology that seeks to align stock selection and weighting with Jewish value pillars. TOV was launched on Feb 26, 2025 and is issued by JLens.
